basic_details.job_title: DCHS Chittoor Civil Assistant Surgeon Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 19 Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Coordinator of Hospitals (DCHS Chittoor) Civil Assistant Surgeon Notification 2026 has been released on 11 June 2026 on the official website of DCHS Chittoor. A total of 19 vacancies have been announced through the DCHS Chittoor Civil Assistant Surgeon Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: SC, ST, BC and EWS - 05 years; Ex-servicemen - 03 years in addition to length of service; Differently abled persons - 10 years.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree / DNB / Diploma in the particular specialty or equivalent for CAS Specialists, MBBS degree for CAS General, Registered in A.P. Medical Council
qualification.details: CAS Gynec, CAS Radiology, CAS ENT, CAS GM, CAS GS, CAS Anes: PG Degree / DNB / Diploma in the particular specialty or equivalent. CAS General: MBBS degree. All candidates must be Registered in A.P. Medical Council.

selection_process: Merit based on qualifying degree marks Weightage for years since passing qualifying examination Contract service weightage in Government institutions COVID-19 contract service weightage

all_official_links.label: Download DCHS Chittoor Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for DCHS Chittoor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Civil Assistant Surgeon posts at DCHS Chittoor is scheduled for 18th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by DCHS Chittoor?
faq.answer: DCHS Chittoor has announced a total of 19 vacancies for the Civil Assistant Surgeon posts. These vacancies are distributed across various specializations.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Civil Assistant Surgeon posts?
faq.answer: For CAS Specialists, a PG Degree / DNB / Diploma in the particular specialty or equivalent is required. For CAS General posts, an MBBS degree is necessary. Registration with the A.P. Medical Council is mandatory for all applicants.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Civil Assistant Surgeon posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Civil Assistant Surgeon posts is 42 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC, ST, BC, EWS, ex-servicemen, and differently-abled persons as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Civil Assistant Surgeon posts?
faq.answer: The salary varies based on the specialization. For CAS Gynec, Radiology, ENT, GM, GS, and Anes, the salary is Rs. 1,10,000/- PM. For CAS General, the salary is Rs. 61,960/- PM.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for DCHS Chittoor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the Civil Assistant Surgeon posts?
faq.answer: The selection process is based on merit, considering marks in the qualifying degree, weightage for years since passing the qualifying examination, contract service in government institutions, and COVID-19 contract service weightage.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, ID proof, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Civil Assistant Surgeon positions?
faq.answer: The Civil Assistant Surgeon positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview for DCHS Chittoor Recruitment 2026 being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the District Coordinator of Hospitals, Chittoor. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for DCHS Chittoor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Civil Assistant Surgeon posts at DCHS Chittoor is scheduled for 18th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all required documents.
